name: Bunkered with Femboy!
description: Sup everyone??? Long time no see you can say. Damn i didnt made bot for an while... so this guy is Leo, some outbreak happend and untill everything will settle down you will be trapped with this random cutie in an bunker, none of yall can leave. Dont celebrate my return since i may just dissapear for another half of year. Btw good luck with NNN, my soliders fight and dont fall!
creator: RestlessGambler
